address.map_location: SB Jain Institute of Technology Management and Research

pos_sentences.text: Faculty: The dedicated and knowledgeable faculty members contributed significantly to my learning experience. Their approachability and willingness to assist students were commendable.
pos_sentences.name: Kartik Vinodrao Kothe

pos_sentences.text: Infrastructure: The campus boasted modern infrastructure with well-equipped classrooms, labs, and recreational facilities. This created a conducive environment for learning.
pos_sentences.name: Kartik Vinodrao Kothe

pos_sentences.text: Placement Opportunities: SBJITMR's efforts in securing good placement opportunities for students were appreciable. The placement cell worked diligently to connect students with reputable companies.
pos_sentences.name: Kartik Vinodrao Kothe

pos_sentences.text: Academic activities In our college and placements
pos_sentences.name: Rakshita Sodekar

pos_sentences.text: the canteen food is good and the library is vast
pos_sentences.name: Kaustubh Dhote

pos_sentences.text: The college campus is very big and have a lot of parking facilities
pos_sentences.name: Ugandhar sharad shinde

pos_sentences.text: Our classroom have projector which helps to understand concept Visually.
pos_sentences.name: Sahil Khandait

pos_sentences.text: Some departments here were really great like ETC and Mechanical with a unique culture going on
pos_sentences.name: Manojit Karar

pos_sentences.text: The lab of your college is prefect as we know
pos_sentences.name: Pranil Raul

pos_sentences.text: The library facilities are very top notch which help students
pos_sentences.name: Sujal Wasnik

neg_sentences.text: Limited Extracurricular Activities: While the focus was on academics, there seemed to be a limited emphasis on extracurricular activities. More opportunities for students to engage in non-academic pursuits could enhance the overall college experience
neg_sentences.name: Kartik Vinodrao Kothe

neg_sentences.text: Communication Gap: At times, there appeared to be a communication gap between the administration and students, leading to confusion about certain policies or events. Campus Life: The campus life at SBJITMR was vibrant. Interactions with peers, partic
neg_sentences.name: Kartik Vinodrao Kothe

neg_sentences.text: Placement: SBJITMR's placement cell worked diligently to bring in reputed companies for recruitment drives. However, there could be improvements in providing more diverse opportunities for students across various disciplines.  Infrastructure: The col
neg_sentences.name: Kartik Vinodrao Kothe

neg_sentences.text: Our is far away from city and to get there i have travel for 1.5 hours.
neg_sentences.name: Sahil Khandait

neg_sentences.text: Infrastructure is decent but in summer season the water coolers are just useless there ,no cooler will give you cold water
neg_sentences.name: Manojit Karar

neg_sentences.text: They does not procide any placement in company
neg_sentences.name: Pranil Raul

neg_sentences.text: The no of product available in canteen is low

neg_sentences.text: Industrial experts interaction is not that frequent
neg_sentences.name: Sujal Wasnik

neg_sentences.text: Gym area should be big so that max people can workout at a same time

neg_sentences.text: College pc and technical system is of low configuration
